tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema — TaskReflection model
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `TaskReflection` Prisma model and apply the migration.

**Files:**
- Modify: `prisma/schema.prisma`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `TaskReflection` model exists with all spec fields
- [ ] `Task` model has `reflections TaskReflection[]`
- [ ] Migration applied; `npx prisma generate` exits 0

**Verify:** `npx prisma migrate status` → shows migration applied

**Steps:**
- Add model to schema.prisma
- Run `npx prisma migrate dev --name add_task_reflection`
- Run `npx prisma generate`
- Commit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma"], "verifyCommand": "npx prisma migrate status", "acceptanceCriteria": ["TaskReflection model exists with all spec fields", "Task model has reflections TaskReflection[]", "Migration applied; npx prisma generate exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: API route — POST /api/tasks/[id]/reflection
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement the POST endpoint that creates a reflection and optionally a follow-up task in one transaction.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/types/index.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/reflection/route.ts`
- Create: `src/app/api/tasks/[id]/reflection/route.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
- [ ] Returns 404 if task not found or belongs to another user
- [ ] Creates TaskReflection row (all fields optional)
- [ ] Creates follow-up Task in same project when nextStepTitle is non-empty
- [ ] Both writes in a single Prisma transaction
- [ ] All tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/\[id\]/reflection/route.test.ts` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/types/index.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/[id]/reflection/route.ts", "src/app/api/tasks/[id]/reflection/route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/app/api/tasks/\\[id\\]/reflection/route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Returns 401 unauthenticated", "Returns 404 task not found/wrong user", "Creates reflection (all fields optional)", "Creates next task in same project when nextStepTitle given", "Single transaction", "All tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ReflectionModal component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the compact full-screen modal with all form fields; POST on save, close without POST on skip/overlay.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/tasks/ReflectionModal.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/tasks/ReflectionModal.test.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Renders notes textarea, time input, 3 difficulty buttons, 3 mood chips, next step input
- [ ] Skip and overlay click close without POST
- [ ] Save POSTs, invalidates ["tasks"] query, calls onClose
- [ ] Form values serialized correctly in POST body
- [ ] All tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/components/tasks/ReflectionModal.test.tsx` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/tasks/ReflectionModal.tsx", "src/components/tasks/ReflectionModal.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/tasks/ReflectionModal.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Renders all 5 field controls", "Skip/overlay close without POST", "Save POSTs and invalidates tasks query", "All tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Wire TaskItem — show modal on task completion
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make TaskItem show ReflectionModal when a task is toggled from undone to done.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/tasks/TaskItem.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/tasks/TaskItem.test.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Toggling incomplete task to done renders ReflectionModal
- [ ] Toggling done task to undone does NOT render ReflectionModal
- [ ] onClose on modal removes it from DOM
- [ ] All existing tests still pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/components/tasks/TaskItem.test.tsx` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/tasks/TaskItem.tsx", "src/components/tasks/TaskItem.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/tasks/TaskItem.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Modal appears on toggle to done", "Modal does not appear on toggle to undone", "onClose hides modal", "No regressions in existing tests"]}
```
